text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The October breeze blows through France.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Racers from around the world have gathered here at this most
prestigious of turf races.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Will the one to snag the crown be the hero of Japan, El Condor Pasa?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Or will it be France's pride and joy, Montjeu?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: The Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe begins... now!
